title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited!
